articles.title: Alien Whistleblower Claims US Has 'Dismembered Gray Bodies' Hidden Inside Underground Military Bases
articles.summary: S. government has recovered alien bodies and hides them in underground military bases, according to an interview on the platform Redacted. He said that crash‑retrieval operations involving non‑human craft and bodies are conducted outside the oversight of elected officials and are controlled by private aerospace contractors and highly compartmentalised defence programmes.

en.title: Alien Whistleblower Claims US Has 'Dismembered Gray Bodies' Hidden Inside Underground Military Bases
en.summary: S. government has recovered alien bodies and hides them in underground military bases, according to an interview on the platform Redacted. He said that crash‑retrieval operations involving non‑human craft and bodies are conducted outside the oversight of elected officials and are controlled by private aerospace contractors and highly compartmentalised defence programmes.

de.title: Außerirdischer Whistleblower behauptet, die USA hätten „graue Körper zerstückelt“, die in unterirdischen Militärstützpunkten versteckt seien
de.summary: Laut einem Interview auf der Plattform Redacted hat die südafrikanische Regierung außerirdische Leichen geborgen und versteckt sie in unterirdischen Militärbasen. Er sagte, dass Bergungsoperationen nach einem Absturz mit nichtmenschlichen Fahrzeugen und Körpern außerhalb der Aufsicht gewählter Amtsträger durchgeführt würden und von privaten Luft- und Raumfahrtunternehmen und stark abgeschotteten Verteidigungsprogrammen kontrolliert würden.

articles.title: Secret agent, who was about to blow the lid off UFO secrets, died 5 years ago. A whistleblower has now raised suspicion
articles.summary: Kevin Childress, a 30‑year Department of Energy criminal investigator, died unexpectedly in 2021 at his Georgia home, with authorities citing complications from COVID‑19. UFO whistleblower Luis Elizondo claims Childress was healthy before his death and had warned that the DOE had a significant role in UAP programs. Elizondo says the DOE is trying to silence him and notes that no public autopsy or detailed cause of death has been released.

en.title: Secret agent, who was about to blow the lid off UFO secrets, died 5 years ago. A whistleblower has now raised suspicion
en.summary: Kevin Childress, a 30‑year Department of Energy criminal investigator, died unexpectedly in 2021 at his Georgia home, with authorities citing complications from COVID‑19. UFO whistleblower Luis Elizondo claims Childress was healthy before his death and had warned that the DOE had a significant role in UAP programs. Elizondo says the DOE is trying to silence him and notes that no public autopsy or detailed cause of death has been released.

de.title: Der Geheimagent, der UFO-Geheimnisse enthüllen wollte, starb vor fünf Jahren. Ein Whistleblower hat nun Verdacht geäußert
de.summary: Kevin Childress, ein 30-jähriger Kriminalermittler des Energieministeriums, starb 2021 unerwartet in seinem Haus in Georgia, wobei die Behörden Komplikationen durch COVID-19 anführten. UFO-Whistleblower Luis Elizondo behauptet, Childress sei vor seinem Tod gesund gewesen und habe gewarnt, dass das DOE eine wichtige Rolle in UAP-Programmen gespielt habe. Elizondo sagt, das Energieministerium versuche ihn zum Schweigen zu bringen und stellt fest, dass weder eine öffentliche Autopsie noch eine detaillierte Todesursache veröffentlicht wurden.

en.title: Harvard Astrophysicist Avi Loeb Decodes The Mysterious Blue Lights UAP Recorded By Apollo Astronauts On Moon
en.summary: S. Department of War released 162 previously classified UFO files, including NASA documents about UAP sightings by Apollo astronauts such as Buzz Aldrin during the 1969 lunar landing. A private briefing for pastors on May 8 2026 showed them media depicting translucent beings with long limbs in wooded settings.

de.title: Der Harvard-Astrophysiker Avi Loeb entschlüsselt die mysteriösen blauen UAP-Lichter, die von Apollo-Astronauten auf dem Mond aufgezeichnet wurden
de.summary: Das US-Kriegsministerium veröffentlichte 162 zuvor geheime UFO-Dateien, darunter NASA-Dokumente über UAP-Sichtungen durch Apollo-Astronauten wie Buzz Aldrin während der Mondlandung 1969. Bei einem privaten Briefing für Pfarrer am 8. Mai 2026 wurden ihnen Medien gezeigt, die durchscheinende Wesen mit langen Gliedmaßen in bewaldeten Umgebungen zeigten.

articles.title: Department of War Publishes Second Release of Unidentified Anomalous Phenomena Files on WAR.GOV/UFO
articles.summary: At President Trump’s order, the Defense Department released about 160 previously classified documents, photos and videos of unidentified anomalous phenomena, including a 1947 report, grainy Apollo 12 lunar photos, and a transcript of Apollo 17 crew describing bright particles. Trump called the release “unprecedented transparency,” and representatives Tim Burchett and Anna Paulina Luna said additional material would be declassified in roughly 30 days.

en.title: Department of War Publishes Second Release of Unidentified Anomalous Phenomena Files on WAR.GOV/UFO
en.summary: At President Trump’s order, the Defense Department released about 160 previously classified documents, photos and videos of unidentified anomalous phenomena, including a 1947 report, grainy Apollo 12 lunar photos, and a transcript of Apollo 17 crew describing bright particles. Trump called the release “unprecedented transparency,” and representatives Tim Burchett and Anna Paulina Luna said additional material would be declassified in roughly 30 days.

de.title: Das Kriegsministerium veröffentlicht die zweite Veröffentlichung von Dateien zu nicht identifizierten anomalen Phänomenen auf WAR.GOV/UFO
de.summary: Auf Befehl von Präsident Trump veröffentlichte das Verteidigungsministerium etwa 160 zuvor geheime Dokumente, Fotos und Videos von nicht identifizierten anomalen Phänomenen, darunter einen Bericht aus dem Jahr 1947, körnige Apollo-12-Mondfotos und eine Abschrift der Apollo-17-Besatzung, die helle Teilchen beschreibt. Trump bezeichnete die Veröffentlichung als „beispiellose Transparenz“, und die Vertreter Tim Burchett und Anna Paulina Luna sagten, dass zusätzliches Material in etwa 30 Tagen freigegeben werde.

summaries.alien-whistleblower-claims-us-has-dismem: Investigative writer Timothy Alberino claimed that the U.S. government has recovered alien bodies and hides them in underground military bases, according to an interview on the platform Redacted. He said that crash‑retrieval operations involving non‑human craft and bodies are conducted outside the oversight of elected officials and are controlled by private aerospace contractors and highly compartmentalised defence programmes. Alberino referenced anecdotal eyewitness accounts of “gray aliens” at alleged retrieval sites, describing dismembered bodies and transparent fluids, and cited former intelligence official David Grusch’s 2023 testimony that the U.S. had recovered “non‑human biologics.” No publicly available evidence has been produced to substantiate Alberino’s allegations, and U.S. defence agencies have not confirmed the existence of such programmes. Congressional interest in UAP investigations remains high, with lawmakers calling for greater transparency, but the Pentagon maintains that its All‑domain Anomaly Resolution Office has not produced verified evidence of extraterrestrial activity.
summaries.secret-agent-who-was-about-to-blow-the-l: Kevin Childress, a 30‑year Department of Energy criminal investigator, died unexpectedly in 2021 at his Georgia home, with authorities citing complications from COVID‑19. UFO whistleblower Luis Elizondo claims Childress was healthy before his death and had warned that the DOE had a significant role in UAP programs. Elizondo says the DOE is trying to silence him and notes that no public autopsy or detailed cause of death has been released. The FBI is investigating a series of missing and dead scientists linked to secret nuclear and UFO programs, including the disappearance of retired General William Neil McCasland. Other scientists, such as David Wilcock, have also died under suspicious circumstances, adding to the pattern of unexplained losses.
summaries.film-former-pentagon-linked-physicist-al: Former CIA‑funded researcher Dr. Hal Puthoff said the U.S. has recovered four distinct extraterrestrial species from crashed UFOs. Puthoff, who has not seen the specimens himself, reports that people involved in recoveries have identified at least four types. Dr. Eric Davis, a former AAWSAP colleague, identified the species as Grays, Nordics, Insectoids, and Reptilians, describing each as humanoid with two arms and legs and giving size and appearance details. Former Air Force intelligence officer David Grusch testified in 2023 that the U.S. possessed “non‑human biologics” recovered from dozens of crashed UFOs. Director Dan Farrah of the film *Age of Disclosure* said he has spoken off‑record with recovery participants who declined to appear on camera, and one potential interview was canceled after the participant withdrew.
summaries.sighting-harvard-astrophysicist-avi-loeb: The U.S. Department of War released 162 previously classified UFO files, including NASA documents about UAP sightings by Apollo astronauts such as Buzz Aldrin during the 1969 lunar landing. A private briefing for pastors on May 8 2026 showed them media depicting translucent beings with long limbs in wooded settings. The pastors, including Joseph Zupetz and Tony Merkel, said the images could relate to biblical prophecies and warned that the disclosure might be a “great deception” that could lead to demonic influence. Some pastors tweeted that the UFO disclosures are a cover‑up for a demonic release and that the events could signal the end times, while it remains unclear how the released files will be interpreted.
summaries.file-release-department-of-war-publishes: At President Trump’s order, the Defense Department released about 160 previously classified documents, photos and videos of unidentified anomalous phenomena, including a 1947 report, grainy Apollo 12 lunar photos, and a transcript of Apollo 17 crew describing bright particles. Trump called the release “unprecedented transparency,” and representatives Tim Burchett and Anna Paulina Luna said additional material would be declassified in roughly 30 days. Experts such as Harvard astrophysicist Avi Loeb and journalist Leslie Kean said the new material does not provide evidence of alien technology or extraterrestrial life and that the images could be explained by asteroid impacts or other mundane sources. Critics, including former Rep. Marjorie Taylor Greene, called the disclosure a distraction from Trump’s political woes, while UAP investigator Mick West noted that similar information had already been released by the Biden administration.
